general.demo_title: A survey of metrics used for image colorization assessment
general.description:
This demo evaluates a colorized image with a panel of image-quality metrics surveyed in the companion article. Two usage modes are supported, depending on what is uploaded:

  • Single image (colorized only): runs the referenceless metrics only — BRISQUE, NIQE, MANIQA, Colorfulness.
  • Paired (colorized + ground-truth color reference): additionally runs the reference-based metrics — PSNR, SSIM, LPIPS, FID.

Higher is better for PSNR, SSIM, MANIQA, and Colorfulness; lower is better for LPIPS, FID, BRISQUE, and NIQE.
general.input_description: Two modes are admissible: (a) upload only the colorized image to evaluate — the four no-reference metrics will be computed; or (b) upload a pair of images — the colorized image (slot 1) and its ground-truth color reference (slot 2) — to additionally compute the four reference-based metrics.

inputs.description: Ground-truth color reference (optional — provide for the four reference-based metrics)

params.label: PSNR color space
params.comments: Affects PSNR only. CIELAB averages over the a*/b* chrominance channels; RGB averages over all three channels.

params.label: LPIPS backbone
params.comments: Pre-trained network used to extract perceptual features. Used only in paired mode.

params.label: FID feature dimensionality
params.comments: Inception V3 layer used for FID features. Lower dimensions are recommended for small datasets such as a single-image comparison. Used only in paired mode.

params.label: Colorfulness variant
params.comments: Three variants from the literature. v1 and v2 operate on CIELAB chrominance; v3 operates on RGB rg/yb opponent channels.
